block2.heading: Company overview
block2.imageAlt: Factory workers at the Semarang briquetting facility
block2.imageCaption: Photo: factory team on the production floor (placeholder).

whoWeAre.heading: Who we are
whoWeAre.body: We are an Indonesian manufacturer and wholesale exporter of coconut shell charcoal briquettes for shisha and hookah. Our specialism is narrow on purpose: low-ash, low-moisture briquettes pressed from 100% coconut shell charcoal. We do not produce BBQ charcoal, activated carbon, or wood/lump charcoal — every line in the factory is tuned for shisha specifications.

legal.heading: Legal registration
legal.bodyTemplate: {{legalName}} is a registered Indonesian company (NIB {{nib}}, NPWP {{taxId}}). The factory operates under {{isoStandard}}, audited by {{auditors}}. Every commercial invoice and bank receipt is issued under the registered company name only.

certifications.heading: Certifications & compliance
certifications.bodyTemplate: Every shipment travels with {{imdgLabel}} documentation, an independent Self-Heating Test (SHT), and a Preferential Certificate of Origin. Our quality system is audited by {{auditors}} laboratories.
certifications.patentsTemplate: We hold {{count}} patented manufacturing technologies for charcoal briquetting.
certifications.halalConfirmed: The factory and product line are halal-certified.

supplyChain.heading: Our supply chain
supplyChain.bodyVillagesTemplate: We source raw coconut shells from {{villages}} partner villages in {{region}}, covering {{trees}}+ palm trees. This network secures year-round raw-material availability and consistent ash and moisture across every container.
supplyChain.bodyTreesTemplate: We source raw coconut shells from partner villages in {{region}}, covering {{trees}}+ palm trees. This network secures year-round raw-material availability and consistent ash and moisture across every container.
supplyChain.bodyRegionOnly: We source raw coconut shells from a network of partner villages in {{region}}, securing year-round raw-material availability and consistent ash and moisture across every container.
supplyChain.carbonizationTemplate: Upstream carbonization is handled at our own plant in {{city}}, {{region}}.

shipping.heading: Direct shipping
shipping.bodyLinesTemplate: Booked direct with {{lines}} from the {{portLabel}}. No freight middleman, no double-handling, no surprise demurrage.
shipping.bodyNoLines: All FOB shipments load from the {{portLabel}}.

virtualTour.heading: See the factory with your own eyes
virtualTour.subtitle: Take a virtual 360° tour of the production facility from anywhere in the world.

trust.heading: Payment terms
trust.bodyTemplate: All payments are accepted exclusively by bank transfer to the company account under the name {{legalName}}. Accepted currencies: {{currencies}}. We never accept payments to personal accounts and never accept funds under any other beneficiary name.
trust.bodyCryptoSuffix: We also accept USDT (TRON TRC-20 network).
trust.lastVerifiedTemplate: Last verified by phone with the director on {{date}}.

block6.heading: A message from our factory owner
block6.videoAltTemplate: Video message from {{owner}}, owner and director of {{legalName}}
block6.transcriptPlaceholder: Hello — my name is {{owner}}. Thank you for visiting our website. The full transcript of the factory introduction video will be published here once the recording is complete. In the meantime, you are welcome to schedule a live WhatsApp video tour of the factory or visit us in person in Semarang. Every container we ship carries the same compliance documentation: ISO 9001 audit, IMDG UN 1361 paperwork, an independent Self-Heating Test, and a Preferential Certificate of Origin. We look forward to working with you.
